issues.description: assert used for runtime checks; assertions can be disabled with optimization flags.
issues.fix: Use explicit conditional checks and raise concrete exceptions for runtime validation.

issues.description: Broad 'except Exception' may swallow critical failures.
issues.fix: Catch only expected exception types and re-raise unknown failures.
